maintext: Vijay Gill was a prolific network engineer employed by various ISPs and hyperscale networks including UUNet, AOL, Microsoft, Google, and Salesforce. He was a contributor to the wider Internet community through his involvement with the IETF, IAB, and NANOG, and co-authored multiple RFCs related to Internet architecture and routing.

contributions.title: RFC 3582 - Goals for IPv6 Site-Multihoming Architectures
contributions.description: Co-authored RFC defining goals for IPv6 site-multihoming architectures.

contributions.title: RFC 4451 - BGP MULTI_EXIT_DISC (MED) Considerations
contributions.description: Co-authored RFC on BGP MED attribute considerations for network routing.
